title: Prove Grabowski runtime and broker recovery
goal: Exercise Grabowski runtime, audit, connector and privileged-broker recovery through declared bounded paths and evidence-bound return conditions.

approval.note: User explicitly authorized full registration and implementation on 2026-07-18; live-state, claims, diff review, CI, merge and runtime evidence remain mandatory.

acceptance.assertion: A lost or invalid runtime release can be restored to a manifest-bound healthy release.
Audit-chain recovery preserves or explicitly repairs integrity without silent truncation.
Runtime health and connector snapshot readiness remain distinct and high-risk actions fail closed when required.
Privileged broker recovery is demonstrated without broadening templates or exposing secrets.

does_not_establish: authority outside the listed source systems
